summary: Comprehensive testing of LP-TOOL-001 (TCO Calculator) and LP-TOOL-002 (Load Profitability Analyzer) features. All backend APIs and frontend flows verified successfully.
critical_code_review_comments: Duplicate /api/webhook/stripe route defined twice in server.py (lines ~694 and ~1026) - FastAPI will use the second one silently

test_credentials.note: Coach user and session seeded in test_database via mongosh

seed_data_creation: Created coach user (user_id=coach_vince_001) and session token in MongoDB test_database. Saved CPM=0.85 via /api/cpm/save for load analyzer testing.

tests_verified.1_GET_tools_access_coach: PASS - returns has_access=true for vince@launchpathedu.com (coach bypass works)
tests_verified.2_POST_tools_load_save: PASS - saves load analysis for logged-in coach
tests_verified.3_GET_tools_load_saved: PASS - retrieves saved load analysis correctly
tests_verified.6_tools_index_page: PASS - ToolsIndexPage loads, shows LP-TOOL-001 and LP-TOOL-002
tests_verified.7_tco_calculator_access: PASS - TCOCalculatorPage accessible to coach (existing functionality)
tests_verified.8_load_analyzer_access: PASS - LoadAnalyzerPage grants access to coach, no access gate shown
tests_verified.9_GO_verdict: PASS - Rate=1210/1000mi => RPM=1.21 >= CPM*1.30(1.105) => GO verdict with TAKE THIS LOAD
tests_verified.10_NEGOTIATE_verdict: PASS - Rate=935/1000mi => RPM=0.935 >= 0.85 but < 1.105 => NEGOTIATE with COUNTER THIS LOAD
tests_verified.11_DECLINE_verdict: PASS - Rate=800/1000mi => RPM=0.80 < 0.85 => DECLINE with PASS ON THIS LOAD
tests_verified.12_CPM_source_card: PASS - Shows saved CPM $0.850/mi from TCO calculator
tests_verified.13_ACCESS_GRANTED_badge: PASS - Shows ACCESS GRANTED badge for logged-in coach on Tools Index
tests_verified.14_ENROLLED_MEMBERS_ONLY: PASS - Shows ENROLLED MEMBERS ONLY notice for guest users

context_for_next_testing_agent: All LP-TOOL-001 and LP-TOOL-002 features are working correctly. Coach session token coach_session_test_1774054344888 is valid in MongoDB test_database. CPM of $0.85 is saved for coach user. Duplicate stripe webhook route in server.py is a minor code issue to note.
rca_of_issues: No bugs found. One code quality issue: duplicate @api_router.post('/webhook/stripe') defined at line ~694 and ~1026 in server.py. FastAPI silently uses the last definition.
